briefdescription.para: AES IV range cache start offset.
SPK revoke id cache start offset.

description.para: Boot mode disable Efuse bits programming related macros

briefdescription.para: QSPI32 Boot mode disable bit column value: 8.
OSPI Boot mode disable bit column value: 9.
JTAG Boot mode disable bit column value: 11.
SMAP Boot mode disable bit column value: 12.
Serial Boot mode disable bit column value: 13.
QSPI24 Boot mode disable bit column value: 15.

description.para: Efuse Cache Security Control bits, shifts, masks, rows and columns

briefdescription.para: Scan Clear En bit column value: 5.
Hash PUF or PPK bit column value: 6.
JTAG error out disable bit column value: 14.
User write lock bit column value: 15.
PUF test2 disable bit column value: 24.
AES read/write lock bit 0 column value: 24.
AES read/write lock bit 1 column value: 25.
PPK0 write lock bit column value: 26.
AES JTAG disable bit column value: 29.

description.para: Efuse Cache Crc Enabled Register bits, shifts, masks and columns

briefdescription.para: Efuse CRC enable bit column value: 24.

description.para: Xilinx control register bits, shifts and masks

briefdescription.para: OSPI Reset Recovery Delay Control column.
ROM RSVD OSPI Device Reset Choice column.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl start column.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl end column.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl number of rows.
OSPI Reset Recovery Delay Control shift.
ROM RSVD OSPI Device Reset Choice shift.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl shift.
OSPI Reset Recovery Delay Control mask.
ROM RSVD OSPI Device Reset Choice mask.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl mask.
OSPI Reset Recovery Delay Control bits.
ROM RSVD OSPI Device Reset Choice bits.
ROM OSPI Cmd Seq Ctrl bits.
PPK1 write lock bit column value: 27.
PPK2 write lock bit column value: 28.
